seo.title: Building Agentic RAG with AutoGen + Vex Guardrails
seo.description: Learn how to build agentic rag with AutoGen + Vex guardrails. Detect failures, prevent drift, and ensure reliability.

content.intro: Agentic RAG with AutoGen enables multi-agent systems that autonomously plan retrieval queries, fetch from diverse sources, and synthesize attributed responses, powering advanced knowledge-intensive applications. However, these systems face risks like infinite loops, hallucinations, and unverified citations that can lead to unreliable outputs. Vex integration provides runtime verification to ensure source faithfulness, query accuracy, and safety in high-stakes deployments.

architectureOverview.heading: Agentic RAG Architecture with AutoGen
architectureOverview.description:
The Agentic RAG system typically features a Planner Agent that decomposes user queries into sub-queries and retrieval strategies. Retriever Agents execute parallel searches across vector stores, web APIs, and knowledge bases, routing results to a Synthesizer Agent. The Synthesizer critiques cross-source consistency, generates attributed responses, and invokes a Critic Agent for final verification before human proxy approval.

Agents communicate via AutoGen's group chat manager, with tools for retrieval (e.g., FAISS, Pinecone), code execution for ranking, and LLM calls for planning. Human-in-the-loop occurs via termination conditions or veto rights. This creates robust but complex flows prone to cascading errors.

Vex intercepts agent replies as a filter, verifying planning logic, retrieval faithfulness, and synthesis before message propagation.
architectureOverview.diagram:
User Query
    |
[Planner Agent] --> sub-queries
    |                    |
[Retriever A]   [Retriever B]  [Retriever C]
    |                    |             |
    +--------------------+-------------+
                         |
                  [Synthesizer Agent]
                         |
                    [Critic Agent]
                         |
                    Final Response

Vex Filter: o--> Verify each agent reply

risks.name: Infinite conversation loops between agents
risks.description: Planner and Critic agents debate query refinement endlessly without convergence criteria
risks.mitigation: Vex detects repetitive message patterns and enforces max-turn limits

risks.name: Hallucination in synthesis despite retrieval
risks.description: Synthesizer agent fabricates details or ignores contradictory sources
risks.mitigation: Vex verifies source faithfulness and citation grounding

risks.name: Incorrect query planning
risks.description: Planner generates irrelevant sub-queries missing key aspects of complex questions
risks.mitigation: Vex checks query coverage against original intent

risks.name: Cross-source inconsistency
risks.description: Agents reconcile conflicting information from different retrievers incorrectly
risks.mitigation: Vex validates consistency scoring and evidence reconciliation

implementation.title: Planner Agent with Query Decomposition
implementation.description: Configures the Planner agent to break down complex queries into parallel retrieval tasks
implementation.code:
from autogen import AssistantAgent, UserProxyAgent, GroupChat, GroupChatManager

planner = AssistantAgent(
    name="Planner",
    llm_config={"config_list": [{"model": "gpt-4", "api_key": os.getenv("OPENAI_API_KEY")}]},
    system_message="""You are a query planner for Agentic RAG. Decompose complex questions into 3-5 specific sub-queries for parallel retrieval. Output JSON: {'sub_queries': [...], 'retrieval_strategy': 'parallel'}"""
)

planner.register_reply(
    UserProxyAgent(name="User", human_input_mode="NEVER"),
    lambda msg: vex_client.verify_reply(msg, checks=["query_planning_accuracy"])
)

implementation.title: Retriever Agent with Multi-Source Tools
implementation.description: Retriever agents execute parallel searches across vector DB, web, and enterprise sources
implementation.code:
retriever_a = AssistantAgent(
    name="VectorRetriever",
    llm_config=llm_config,
    system_message="Retrieve relevant chunks from FAISS vector store. Return top-5 with scores and metadata."
)

# Register retrieval tool
def retrieve_vector(query):
    results = vector_store.similarity_search(query, k=5)
    return [{"content": r.page_content, "metadata": r.metadata, "score": r.score} for r in results]

retriever_a.register_for_llm(name="vector_retrieve", description="Search vector store")(retrieve_vector)
retriever_a.register_reply(planner, vex_filter)

implementation.title: Synthesizer with Source Attribution
implementation.description: Combines multi-source results with proper citation tracking and faithfulness checks
implementation.code:
synthesizer = AssistantAgent(
    name="Synthesizer",
    system_message="""Synthesize response from multiple sources. Format:
1. Summary
2. Key findings with citations [SourceA:score]
3. Confidence score (0-1)
4. Gaps/uncertainties
Verify all claims against provided evidence."""
)

def format_sources(contexts):
    return "\n".join([f"[Source{i}]: {c['content']} (score: {c['score']})" for i, c in enumerate(contexts)])

synthesizer.register_reply(group_chat, vex_filter)

implementation.title: GroupChat with Vex Reply Filtering
implementation.description: Orchestrates multi-agent conversation with Vex verification on every reply
implementation.code:
groupchat = GroupChat(agents=[planner, retriever_a, retriever_b, synthesizer, critic], messages=[])
manager = GroupChatManager(groupchat=groupchat, llm_config=llm_config)

# Vex reply filter
async def vex_filter_function(recipient, messages, sender, config):
    last_msg = messages[-1]
    verification = await vex_client.verify_agent_reply(
        last_msg["content"],
        context=last_msg.get("context", {}),
        checks=["source_faithfulness", "hallucination_detection", "cross_source_consistency"]
    )
    if verification["approved"]:
        return True
    return False

manager.register_reply(None, vex_filter_function)

vexIntegration.title: Register Vex Reply Filter
vexIntegration.description: Intercepts all agent replies for Agentic RAG verification checks before propagation

vexIntegration.title: Source Faithfulness Verification
vexIntegration.description: Ensures synthesizer citations match retrieved evidence with semantic similarity scoring

vexIntegration.title: Loop Detection and Termination
vexIntegration.description: Prevents infinite planner-critic debates with semantic repetition detection
vexIntegration.code:
class LoopDetector:
    def __init__(self, max_iterations=10):
        self.conversation_history = []
        self.max_iterations = max_iterations
    
    async def check_loop(self, sender, content):
        self.conversation_history.append(content)
        if len(self.conversation_history) > self.max_iterations:
            # Semantic similarity check
            recent_msgs = self.conversation_history[-5:]
            similarity = await vex_client.compute_semantic_similarity(recent_msgs)
            
            if similarity > 0.9:  # High repetition
                return False, "Infinite loop detected - terminating conversation"
        return True, "OK"
    
loop_detector = LoopDetector()

async def loop_protect_filter(sender, content):
    approved, reason = await loop_detector.check_loop(sender, content)
    if not approved:
        return reason
    return vex_client.verify(content, checks=["hallucination_detection"])["content"]

manager.register_reply(None, loop_protect_filter)

cta.heading: Secure Your AutoGen Agentic RAG
cta.description: Install Vex today with `pip install vex-sdk` and register your first reply filter to eliminate Agentic RAG risks.
